name: PT Panca Global Kapital Tbk
summary: PT Panca Global Kapital Tbk engages in the brokerage and underwriting services in Indonesia. It is also involved in development and investment business, as well as general trading activities. The company was formerly known as PT Panca Global Securities Tbk. PT Panca Global Kapital Tbk was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.
